title: Add pagination helper for list endpoints
description: Utility function to slice a result list for paginated API responses. Contains an off-by-one error that causes the last item of each page to be omitted.

known_bugs.description: Off-by-one error: slice uses `end` exclusive index but caller passes `page * page_size` which already excludes the last item — should be `(page + 1) * page_size`.
